question: ¿Qué asociación álbum-artista es correcta para “The Miseducation of Lauryn Hill”?

answers.text: The Miseducation of Lauryn Hill — John Coltrane
The Miseducation of Lauryn Hill — Prince
The Miseducation of Lauryn Hill — Lauryn Hill
The Miseducation of Lauryn Hill — Eagles

explanation: “The Miseducation of Lauryn Hill” es un álbum de Lauryn Hill.
